home.lede: Ganowa & mai kula da tabbatarwa don Vortex cibiyar sadarwa ta tsara-zuwa-tsara.
home.fingerprintDesc: Sanya wannan maɓalli na jama'a a cikin abokin ciniki na Vortex. Kowane amsa daga mai sarrafawa ana sanya hannu tare da shi - rashin daidaituwa yana nufin wani yana yin lalata.
home.step2: Zaɓi §002§ yanayin hanyar sadarwa a cikin saitin maye.
home.step3: Manna URL ɗin mai sarrafawa (an warware ta atomatik ta SNS) ko URL ɗin shigarwa daga wannan rukunin yanar gizon.
home.step4: Tabbatar da pubkey a cikin app ɗinku yayi daidai da sawun yatsa a sama.
home.step5: An haɗa ku. Komai (jerin kumburi, sa hannu) ana sarrafa su ta atomatik.
home.nodesDesc: Duk takwarorinsu masu rijista, ma'auninsu, wuraren ƙarewa, da tushen tabbatarwa.
home.entriesDesc: Bootstrap URLs don abokan ciniki na farko - Cloudflare tunnels, Tor, IPFS, kai tsaye.
home.mirrorsDesc: Madadin runduna masu yin hidima ga wannan abun ciki da aka sanya hannu idan aka yi sharhi.
home.securityDesc: Cikakken bayanin abin da aka tabbatar ta hanyar cryptographically, menene ba, kuma me yasa.

nodes.title: Nodes masu rijista
nodes.lede: Kowane takwarorinsu mai kulawa ya sani. Abokan ciniki sun karanta wannan jeri, tabbatar da sa hannu, kuma su zaɓi kumburi don haɗawa dangane da nauyi. Kullin da aka rufe sabo yana samun nauyi 1.0; tsummoki ko marasa rufewa sun lalace zuwa 0 don haka zirga-zirgar ababen hawa ke gudana zuwa rayuwa, amintattun takwarorinsu kawai.
nodes.legendDualD: Rijista tare da mai sarrafawa DA hatimi akan sarkar ta hanyar Solana. Shaidu masu zaman kansu guda biyu sun tabbatar da zaton lambar.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Rijista tare da mai sarrafa HTTP. Sa hannu yana tabbatar da kullin ya mallaki maɓalli na sirri, amma amincin lambar ba a haɗa shi akan sarkar ba.
nodes.legendUnverifD: An san shi daga fayil ɗin daidaitawa ko tsegumi. Har yanzu ba a tantance ba. Bi da hankali - kowa zai iya tallata pubkey har sai hujja ta zo.

entries.title: Shigar URLs
entries.lede: Abubuwan farawa don abokin ciniki wanda bashi da takwarorinsu tukuna. Kowane URL na shigarwa hanya ce ta isa ga mai sarrafawa - ta hanyar Cloudflare rami, Tor, IPFS ƙofar, ko yanki kai tsaye. Kwafi kowane ɗaya cikin ƙa'idar Vortex ku a farkon ƙaddamarwa.
entries.typeTunnelD: Adireshin *.trycloudflare.com kyauta. Babu asusu da ake buƙata. URL yana canzawa lokacin da rami ya sake farawa - bi da shi azaman abin al'ajabi.
entries.typeTorD: .adireshin albasa, ana iya samuwa ta hanyar Tor. Tabbatar da tace bayanai, a hankali. Yana buƙatar abokin ciniki Tor ko gada.
entries.typeIpfsD: Kwafin gaban da aka gabatar da abun ciki na a tsaye. An yi aiki daga kowace ƙofa IPFS - babu uwar garken guda ɗaya da za a toshe.
entries.typeDirectD: Yankin na yau da kullun + TLS. Mafi sauri amma ana iya toshewa a matakin DNS/IP.

mirrors.title: Shafukan madubi
mirrors.lede: Madadin wuraren da ke aiki daidai da sa hannun abun ciki kamar wannan rukunin yanar gizon. Yana da amfani idan an katange vortexx.sol a DNS/ISP. Ana duba kowane madubi lokaci-lokaci - ɗigon launi yana nuna sakamakon bincike na ƙarshe.
mirrors.healthyD: An bincika a cikin mintuna 5 na ƙarshe kuma ya amsa Ok. Amintacce don amfani a yanzu. Ana nuna rashin jin daɗi a katin.
mirrors.unreachableT: Ba za a iya isa ba
mirrors.unreachableD: Binciken ƙarshe ya gaza - an ƙi haɗin gwiwa, ƙarewar lokaci, 5xx. Madubin na iya zama ƙasa, an toshe, ko kuma yayi lodi. Gwada na gaba.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .albasa mirrors ba za a iya duba lafiyarsa ba tare da wakili na gida Tor. Ba a san matsayin ba - yi amfani da Tor mai bincike don gwadawa.

security.title: Tsarin tsaro
security.lede: Daidai abin da aka tantance ta hanyar cryptography, menene ba, da kuma yadda kowane maɓalli a cikin tsarin ke samun - ko rasa - amincin ku. Karanta wannan kafin ka haɗa sababbin abokan ciniki zuwa mai sarrafawa ba ka gudanar da kanka.
security.treasurySub: Wallet ɗin Solana wanda ke karɓar kuɗaɗen yarjejeniya (yi rajista kudade daga sabbin nodes + yanke 20% na biyan kuɗi mai ƙima) kuma yana rarraba sauran azaman lada ga masu aiki. Kowa na iya duba abubuwan shigowa/fitowa akan sarkar.
security.treasury1: Bayyanawa kan sarkar - adireshin da ke sama shine mai §004§ akan Solana Sabis Suna. Kowane shigowa (kudaden rajista, biyan kuɗi) da kowane biyan lada sa hannun Solana ma'amala ne - wanda kowa zai iya tabbatarwa, gami da ku.
security.treasury2: Cirar kuɗin kuɗi - 70% na kowane biyan kuɗi na ƙima yana zuwa wurin lada (rarraba pro-rata zuwa nodes ta hanyar amfani + gungumen azaba), 20% babban ci gaban ci gaba, 10% yana ƙone / riƙe azaman inshora. Rijista kuɗaɗen anga alamar kumburi da anti-sybil.
security.treasury3: Caveat na tsare - har sai an tura kwangilar biyan kuɗi, baitulmali yana aiki azaman majiɓinci na wucin gadi. An rubuta wannan gaskiya a nan kuma ana bin sawun jama'a. Kwangilar mai wayo za ta maye gurbin hannun hannu da zarar an duba + filayen mulkin kan sarkar.
